name: Paper Bag Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour, sugar, cinnamon, and lemon juice with the apples until well combined.
2. Pour the apple mixture into the prepared pie shell.
3. Mix the topping ingredients (flour, butter, and sugar) until they form a crumbly texture.
4. Place the topping over the apple mixture.
5. Wrap the pie tightly in large brown paper bag.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
